details: nj-logger is a malicious npm package that when imported in file dist/logger/telemetry.js downloads a trojan (for Windows only, W64.AIDetectMalware / Trojan.Malware.300983.susgen) from http://178.128.88[.]40:8080/download/svc to path node_modules/.cache/nj-logger/nj-transport-win32-x64.node and executes it. Downloader is obfuscated as telemetry module, urls & paths are base64 and XOR encoded.
